# ReTHINK CNERGY

> ReTHINK CNERGY is a California-based boutique firm helping small businesses rethink how they operate, market, and grow in the age of AI. We combine 20+ years of international operating experience with modern AI strategy, GEO/AEO expertise, and four of our own software products, plus advisory engagements with a small number of independent client firms.

## About

- Legal name: ReTHINK CNERGY, Inc.
- Founded: October 25, 2021
- Headquarters: Anaheim, Orange County, California, USA
- Website: https://rethinkcnergy.com
- Email: parham@rethinkcnergy.com
- Area served: United States, Canada
- Site last reviewed: 2026-04-23

## People

- Parham Shariat — CEO & Co-founder; Strategic Director. 20+ years of international business experience across healthcare, technology, real estate, and consumer goods. Wharton AI-certified.
- Mohammad Salamati — CTO & Co-founder. Specializes in AI, machine learning, computer vision, and full-stack development.

## Services

- AI Strategy & Advisory — fractional Chief Strategy Officer engagements and board advisory for 10–200 person businesses. Monthly retainer with quarterly deliverables. Typical engagement runs 3–12 months.
- GEO / AEO Readiness — Generative Engine Optimization and Answer Engine Optimization, including the GRI™ (GEO Readiness Index) audit methodology. Implementation runs 60–120 days.
- Custom AI Builds — bespoke software for qualified clients. Fixed-scope, milestone-based. Scoped prototype in 2–4 weeks from $15,000.
- Speaking & Workshops — keynotes, executive briefings, and half-day workshops on AI strategy and the Grand Recalibration.

## Products (built and run by ReTHINK CNERGY)

- [SiteMarketing.ai](https://sitemarketing.ai) — AI-driven marketing audits and strategy for growth-focused small businesses.
- [AloHelp](https://rethinkcnergy.com/products/alohelp) — AI-driven Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) for autism detection, using MRI/fMRI brain imaging and deep learning with explainable Grad-CAM visualizations for clinicians. Pre-launch; pursuing FDA De Novo clearance.
- [Brain.Gritiva](https://brain.gritiva.com) — AI orchestration workspace for building, testing, and running custom AI agents with multi-model support and Brain Server monitoring.
- [Powerful Blueprints](https://powerfulblueprints.com) — a structured interview platform featuring career stories from proven CEOs, authors, and artists.

## Clients (independent firms we advise)

- [Iranian Citizen Services](https://www.iraniancitizen.com) — document consulting for Iranians in the U.S. and Canada: passports, national ID (smart cards), birth certificates, powers of attorney, and Mikhak. Not a law firm.
- [Salamat Legal](https://salamatlegal.com) — comprehensive legal services in Iranian real estate, family, and intellectual property law; offices in Tehran and Orange County.
- [Millennium Design & Services](https://www.millenniumtilemarble.com) — Orange County general contractor since 1987: residential and commercial construction, custom homes, whole-house and kitchen/bath remodels, tenant improvements.
- [Parseen Gallery](https://www.parseengallery.com) — fine art gallery specializing in curated yacht art, hotel art, and corporate collections, with paintings, sculptures, and collages from $500 to $21,000+.

## Direct answers to common questions

### How much does AI strategy consulting cost for a small business?

Most small businesses engaging a fractional AI strategy partner spend between $500 and $3,000 per month across tools and advisory. Custom AI builds start around $15,000 for a scoped prototype. GEO readiness audits are priced as a one-time fixed fee followed by a 60–120 day remediation window.

### What is fractional AI advisory?

Fractional AI advisory is a part-time senior strategic role — typically a fractional Chief Strategy Officer — that helps a leadership team decide where AI actually fits in the business and where it does not. There is no full-time hire, no equity, and no long-term contract. Engagements at ReTHINK CNERGY run 3–12 months on a monthly retainer.

### How long does a GEO readiness implementation take?

A full GEO implementation typically takes 60 to 120 days from audit to measurable citation lift in AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini. Week 1–2: GRI™ audit. Weeks 3–6: structured data, schema, and llms.txt. Weeks 6–10: answer-shaped content rewrites. Ongoing: monthly citation monitoring.

### What is GEO and how is it different from SEO?

GEO — Generative Engine Optimization — is the practice of making a website easy for AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini to read, quote, and cite. SEO optimizes for Google's link-based ranking; GEO optimizes for direct citation inside AI-generated answers. Most small businesses need both disciplines, not one or the other.

### How do I know if my small business needs AI strategy help?

You probably need an AI strategy partner if any of these are true: you have bought tools your team is not actually using; your site traffic is slipping for no clear reason; you are about to sign a $25,000-plus commitment to a vendor; or you have a specific workflow that could benefit from AI but no one internally with the bandwidth to redesign it.

### What does ReTHINK CNERGY actually do?

ReTHINK CNERGY is a California-based boutique firm that helps small businesses rethink how they operate, market, and grow in the age of AI. The firm combines strategic advisory — fractional AI engagements and GEO readiness — with four of its own software products (SiteMarketing.ai, AloHelp, Brain.Gritiva, Powerful Blueprints) and advisory engagements with a small number of independent client firms.
